creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
On Fri, Jul 13, 2012 at 11:36:41AM +0100, Anton Shterenlikht wrote:
> On Fri, Jul 13, 2012 at 10:30:21AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> > Maintainer of math/slatec,
> > 
> > Please note that PR ports/169821 has just been submitted.
> > 
> > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> > and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> Well.. I submitted the patch myself, so I guess I approve of it.

Oh, I see.. My bad.
The university overwrites bris.ac.uk with bristol.ac.uk.

I guess I better change my email to bristol.ac.uk in
all my ports.
